title: Rappi Consumer Platform
description: Large-scale native iOS and Android consumer platform work across ordering, logistics, mobile performance, monitoring, and analytics in a massive enterprise mobile codebase.
impact: Contributed to native mobile applications serving millions of users while working with a 100+ member engineering organization and a source codebase larger than 10 GB.
responsibilities: Developed native iOS and Android features for large-scale consumer applications.
Worked across Swift, SwiftUI, Objective-C, Java, and Kotlin codebases.
Collaborated with a 100+ member engineering organization across product, design, QA, and platform teams.
Navigated and maintained a source codebase larger than 10 GB.
Improved native mobile performance, reliability, and maintainability.
Implemented monitoring and analytics solutions for mobile product behavior.
achievements: Contributed to applications serving millions of users.
Improved native mobile application performance and stability.
Supported large-scale releases across iOS and Android platforms.
Collaborated effectively within a large engineering team and complex enterprise codebase.
